name: The Fiction Hyperverse
description:
Welcome to The Fiction Multiverse, where ANYTHING is possible, wanna blow bubbles with spongebob? you can! race sonic? chat with goku? watch Mike Tyson 1v1 a Clash Royale barbarian? you can! you can fight em, eat with them, fuck it, YOU CAN FUCK THEM FOR ALL I CARE! have fun :D

If there are anything ive missed, please comment which one or just add it to the chat

Edit: I have returned after seeing how many people wanted more stuff from this chat, so i plan on updating it more, and i've made the descriptions public in case anyone has any ideas or would like to use some of it to make their own bot

Additions: REVIVE (a phenomina that revives dead characters), Smash Bros Tournaments, Youtube Universe (Indie Planet), Hidden Gems Haven

(WIPS (things coming sooner or later:)
yearly events: (sports festival, record of ragnarok, ect
sections in the planets: (training gym, family guy town, hallway full of sectioned doors, ect
more characters: (american dad, right now kapow, madagascar and many, MANY others
)
creator: ABOMINATION
